aljazeera.title: US resumes Iran ports blockade as Gulf attacks continue: What’s the latest?
US attacks Iran as IRGC claims strikes on US military sites in Gulf

monitor_the_situation.title: Trump Announces US Naval Blockade of All Iranian Ports and Oil Terminals, Starting Tuesday, Warns Neutral Ships to Leave or Face Fire, Imposes 20% Toll on Strait of Hormuz Transit, Escalating Tensions
— S4 · Political · Strait of Hormuz · 2d ago. The US Army announces a naval blockade on all Iranian ports, effective from 20:00 GMT tomorrow.
